inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 underlying NPAT $510.0M + D&A $48.4M minus normalized capital spending $98M (total capex $176M less $77.7M CHESS replacement), divided by ~194.0M weighted average shares
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 mid-cycle base; underlying EPS 262.9c not used as starting cash because CHESS modernisation elevates capex and net interest income on participant balances is partly rate-sensitive

bear.notes: Activity mean-reversion; CHESS delays; Sympli losses persist; fee pressure

base.notes: Mid-cycle owner cash; Markets and Technology & Data growth; exit ~19x year-7 cash flow

bull.notes: Sustained volumes; CHESS go-live; Sympli break-even; margin expansion on tech spend

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Exchange intangibles and software on balance sheet at cost; no land/NAV misstatement pattern

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Asset-light croupier; no dormant royalty acreage

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: 49.4% Sympli stake; ASX share of Sympli net loss $11.0M FY25 (annual report p.98); no separate terminal in Lawrence base

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: CHESS replacement ($77.7M capex FY25) embedded in Technology & Data capex path, not separate option row

option_scan.question: Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Sympli equity-accounted; carrying value reflects losses; immaterial to consolidated owner cash

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Net interest income $86.8M on participant margin balances partly rate/volume cyclical; normalized in starting owner cash haircut

option_scan.question: Material options after scan?
option_scan.evidence: Lawrence full cash-flow path sufficient; Sympli drag immaterial; CHESS in capex normalization

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
